creator: yamori813@yahoo.co.jp
text:
I work on AR7161(mips big endian) with USB device. I make simple recode command that is 44.1kHz mono recoding.

I do this command soon happen panic. I change recoding to stereo then no problem.

Trap cause = 5 (address error (store) - kernel mode)
[ thread pid 13 tid 100020 ]
Stopped at      0
db> where

feeder_matrix_oss_set_channel_order+0x1848 (?,?,?,?) ra 8014295c sp c439bbf0 sz 0
